'''Babali''' was a tropical [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with an [[Obroan Institute for Archaeology|Obroan Institute]] research base headed by [[Kroddok Stopa]] until his death on [[Brath Qella]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"Babali" was the ancient name of the historical city of Babylon on Earth.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
